behavioural_loop: checks the phone, pretends indifference, checks again
held_ambiguity: whether the next notification will confirm worth or expose the loop as empty performance
visual_world: Cramped night kitchen under single fridge light spill; counter holds cold mug with fingerprint smudges, crumpled receipt, bent spoon; smartphone screen glows intermittently on the surface as the only active light source, its notifications pulling focus in a space that otherwise holds only residue of failed domestic order.
anti_cliches: moody atmospheric darkness without object evidence
frame_prompts: Tight frame on smartphone screen illuminating the rim of a cold mug as thumb deliberately taps notification then retracts, receipt corner pinned under wrist.
Low angle on fridge light cutting across bent spoon and crumpled receipt while smartphone vibrates once, hand enters frame to silence it without looking.
Side profile of torso leaning over counter, smartphone held at eye level for quick scan, cold mug steam absent, fridge light catching fingerprint on handle.
Overhead shot of receipt edges curling under smartphone edge, spoon resting across both, screen glow pulsing as thumb hovers then commits to opening the app.
Close on smartphone placed face-down beside cold mug, hand returning to flip it over after three seconds, fridge light reflecting off spoon bowl.
Diagonal composition with smartphone in foreground, receipt unfolded flat, spoon balanced on mug rim, thumb scrolling feed while body stays rigid.
Fridge door partially open casting light stripe over counter objects, smartphone screen active in shadow, hand reaching to close door instead of checking again.
Macro on smartphone notification badge glowing against dark counter, cold mug condensation ring visible, receipt text blurred beneath, spoon handle casting long shadow.
Hand placing smartphone down with controlled force next to receipt, spoon shifting slightly from the vibration, fridge light steady on the mug's interior.
Three-quarter view of counter arrangement: smartphone centered, cold mug left, receipt right, spoon crossing them, screen lighting the space between as thumb approaches.
Low light on fridge interior spill highlighting spoon tines, smartphone face-up with unread count visible, hand entering to pick up mug instead of device.
Final frame on smartphone screen dimming beside fully unfolded receipt, cold mug moved two inches left, spoon now vertical, fridge light the sole remaining source.
video_concepts: Static kitchen counter sequence: smartphone checks punctuate small deliberate actions like shifting the mug or smoothing the receipt, each check followed by immediate return to object handling, fridge light as constant witness.

Handheld micro-movements tracking the loop: phone lifted for validation glance, placed down with precise pressure, receipt unfolded as counter-evidence, spoon used to stir nothing in the cold mug, no facial reveal until final frame.

Cut rhythm between phone screen glow and domestic residue: notification arrival triggers spoon clatter or receipt crumple, body remains upright and controlled, ending on fridge door closing over active screen.
